methodsAttempted.query: QS 121-130 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and targeted official-page fetches were used across QS121-130. Tool-level evidence was found for RMIT, SKKU, Sapienza, HU Berlin, Aarhus, and Bath.

artifacts.summary: QS121-130 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for six universities. IIT Delhi, IIT Bombay, USTC, and UPM were not expanded because no official tool-level availability source was found in this pass.

artifacts.title: QS121-130 AI Tools Extraction
artifacts.summary: Created 15 source-backed tool records for QS rows 121-130. Records cover one RMIT self-hosted assistant, one SKKU ChatGPT guidance record, one Sapienza Copilot Chat record, nine HU Berlin self-hosted AI tools, two Aarhus Copilot records, and one University of Bath Copilot record.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Records are tracker-derived summaries from public official sources and do not replace official university pages.
Schools without explicit tool-level official evidence were not expanded into named tool conclusions.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
